label: About
title: About Paper Portal Cafe Archive
short_blurb: A daily generated front page where the image is the interface.
body: Daily Frontpage is a daily generated interactive front page. Each edition starts from recent saved signals and source research, becomes a new image-led scene, and stays explorable in the archive. The image is the interface: visible marks, objects, and surfaces in the scene open the real sources that shaped the day.

This iteration began with 87 recent saved-signal files and 74 captured links, then narrowed the page to 9 source windows around @jonaasw1: cool internet things pt. 8 — retro FM radio — library of love letters — on and Idle Cafe, plus 7 more. A source image from pbs.twimg.com helped set the palette, contrast, edge behavior, and gesture. The scene became Paper Portal Cafe Archive: Sunlit paper-portal cafe archive, product-photo rupture in oblique product table grammar: a broad off-white stationery field, cropped pastel envelopes, two hero-scale anchors colliding as a deep cobalt flap and cream receipt slab, with a glossy instant-print aperture half-occluding the seam. Rust-orange recursive cu... After the image was made, a plate-reading pass mapped 9 visible regions and the mask audit tightened them against large cobalt folded envelope flap, cream torn receipt-like paper slab, and glossy black instant-print aperture.

typography.rationale: Bricolage Grotesque and Space Grotesk fit record, arcade, and listening-room editions while Fraunces keeps source captions tactile.
